The '''Jastaal''' were an [[Bird/Legends|avian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that [[Language/Legends|spoke]] in a trilling [[Jastaal language|language]]. They had [[Limb/Legends|wings]] that partially extended when they walked, lifting their bodies so that they appeared to be half-gliding along,<ref name="HSR" /> bouncing on the wind.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|142|Jastaal}}</ref> At some point between [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]] and [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'', of which ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' is part, to between [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] and [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].</ref> a number of Jastaal were present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] at the same [[Time/Legends|time]] that the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was there investigating an [[Zlarb and Magg's enslavement ring|enslavement ring]]. After noticing them, Solo reflected that their plumage was beautiful.<ref name="HSR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Jastaal first appeared in ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'', a [[1979]] novel written by [[Brian Daley]] as the second volume of the ''[[Star Wars: The Han Solo Adventures]]'' trilogy.<ref name="HSR" /> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] source article that was published in the [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine, attributes the [[Jastaal system]], misspelled as "Tastaal system," to ''Han Solo's Revenge''. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> Accordingly, this article refrains from assuming that it is meant to be the Jastaal's point of origin.<ref name="Twinkle" />
